cards.question: Standalone-компонент приветствия
cards.task: Создай standalone-компонент GreetingComponent: selector app-greeting, шаблон с @Input() name и текст «Hello, {{ name }}!».

cards.question: Сервис с providedIn root
cards.task: Напиши injectable-сервис CounterService с методами increment(): number и value(): number (внутренний счётчик).

cards.question: Двустороннее связывание
cards.task: Standalone-компонент с input [(ngModel)] для title и параграфом, выводящим title.

cards.question: Reactive form — login
cards.task: Компонент с FormGroup: email (required), password (required, min 6). Кнопка submit disabled если form invalid.

cards.question: HttpClient GET
cards.task: Сервис UserApi с методом getUsers(): Observable<User[]> через HttpClient GET /api/users.

cards.question: Async pipe в шаблоне
cards.task: Standalone UsersListComponent: users$ из UserApi, шаблон @for по users$ | async.

cards.question: Output EventEmitter
cards.task: Дочерний компонент Rating с @Output() rated = new EventEmitter<number>() и кнопками 1–5.

cards.question: RouterLink и RouterLinkActive
cards.task: NavComponent: ссылки /home и /about с routerLinkActive="active".

cards.question: Lazy load standalone route
cards.task: Маршрут path 'admin' с loadComponent для AdminPage.

cards.question: Route guard CanActivateFn
cards.task: Функция authGuard: inject AuthService, return router.parseUrl('/login') если !isLoggedIn(), иначе true.

cards.question: Signal counter
cards.task: CounterComponent: signal count, кнопка increment через count.update.

cards.question: computed signal
cards.task: Компонент с signal items: string[] и computed totalLength — сумма длин строк.

cards.question: effect для логирования
cards.task: Комponent с signal query и effect в constructor, который console.log при изменении query.

cards.question: Pure pipe uppercase truncate
cards.task: Pipe truncate с @Pipe name truncate, transform(value: string, limit = 20): string.

cards.question: Custom directive — highlight
cards.task: Директива appHighlight: @HostBinding('style.backgroundColor') yellow при hover.

cards.question: ControlValueAccessor — toggle
cards.task: Минимальный ToggleComponent с NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR, writeValue/registerOnChange, клик переключает boolean.

cards.question: HttpInterceptor — auth header
cards.task: interceptor authInterceptor: clone request с Authorization Bearer token из AuthService.

cards.question: Resolver для данных роута
cards.task: userResolver: inject UserApi, return getUserById(route.paramMap.get('id')!).

cards.question: @defer блок
cards.task: Шаблон с @defer (on viewport) для тяжёлого HeavyChartComponent и @placeholder «Loading…».

cards.question: inject() в field initializer
cards.task: Комponent использует private api = inject(ProductApi) без constructor DI.

cards.question: Model input (Angular 17+)
cards.task: Комponent с input.required<string>() для title и шаблоном h1.

cards.question: output() function
cards.task: Child с output<number>() saved и кнопка emit(42).

cards.question: FormControl в standalone
cards.task: Reactive field search: FormControl default '', input [formControl] и valueChanges subscribe в ngOnInit.

cards.question: switchMap поиск
cards.task: SearchService.search(term): Observable<Item[]> — в компоненте search.valueChanges pipe switchMap к search.

cards.question: NgOptimizedImage
cards.task: Комponent с NgOptimizedImage, img ngSrc="/hero.jpg" width height priority.

cards.question: TrackBy функция
cards.task: Комponent *ngFor trackById для items с id (class Item { id, name }).

cards.question: HostListener document:keydown
cards.task: Комponent слушает @HostListener('document:keydown.escape') и закрывает modal flag.

cards.question: Content projection ng-content
cards.task: CardComponent с ng-content select="[card-title]" и default ng-content.

cards.question: ng-template ngTemplateOutlet
cards.task: Parent с TemplateRef #tpl и ngTemplateOutlet с context { $implicit: name }.

cards.question: CanDeactivate guard
cards.task: canDeactivate: если form.dirty — confirm('Leave?').

cards.question: MatDialog open (conceptual)
cards.task: Сервис DialogService openConfirm(): Observable<boolean> — open ConfirmDialogComponent, afterClosed.

cards.question: Signal input + OnPush
cards.task: ChangeDetection OnPush component с input signal user и @if (user()) show email.

cards.question: Resource API (Angular 19 concept)
cards.task: Псевдо: rxResource или signal + toSignal(http.get) для products.

cards.question: Standalone bootstrapApplication
cards.task: main.ts: bootstrapApplication(AppComponent, providers: [provideRouter(routes), provideHttpClient()]).

cards.question: Functional ErrorHandler
cards.task: provideAppInitializer или ErrorHandler — class GlobalHandler implements ErrorHandler handleError console.error.

cards.question: Route title и data
cards.task: Route с title: 'Products' и data: { animation: 'ProductsPage' }.

cards.question: ViewChild signal
cards.task: Component с viewChild.required<ElementRef>('box') и ngAfterViewInit log nativeElement.

cards.question: DestroyRef + takeUntilDestroyed
cards.task: Component подписка interval pipe takeUntilDestroyed() без manual unsubscribe.

cards.question: Validators.custom email
cards.task: ValidatorFn emailPattern: return { email: true } если нет @.

cards.question: FormArray динамические телефоны
cards.task: FormBuilder group с FormArray phones, метод addPhone(), template @for control of phones.controls.

cards.question: Pipe async + @let (Angular 18+)
cards.task: Шаблон @let user = users$ | async; @if (user) { ... }

cards.question: Structural directive *ngIf else
cards.task: Шаблон *ngIf="loggedIn(); else guest" с ng-template #guest.

cards.question: Router outlet + child routes
cards.task: Parent с router-outlet и children routes path '' -> List, ':id' -> Detail.

cards.question: Environment injection
cards.task: InjectionToken API_URL и useValue в providers из environment.apiUrl.

cards.question: TestBed standalone component
cards.task: Минимальный spec: TestBed.configureTestingModule({ imports: [CounterComponent] }); createComponent; click increment.
